nasb.text: You will eat, but you will not be satisfied, And your vileness will be in your midst. You will try to remove for safekeeping, But you will not preserve anything, And what you do preserve I will give to the sword.

esv.text: You shall eat, but not be satisfied, and there shall be hunger within you; you shall put away, but not preserve, and what you preserve I will give to the sword.

cnv.text: 你要吃，卻吃不飽； 因你的腹中常有疾病。 你要懷孕，卻不能生下來； 你生下來的， 我都要交給刀劍。

ccb.text: 你吃，却吃不饱，仍然腹中空空。 你聚敛钱财，却保不住。 你保住的，我要交给拿刀的。
